message:
feat(freeze): Add define_func opcode Zig support

Convert define_func opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode defines a global function.

Stack effect: [func] -> [] (pops 1)

Implementation:
- Pops function from stack
- Gets global object
- Sets property on global with function name
- Frees global object reference
- Handles empty atom names by just freeing the popped value
- In Zig: uses block expression for POP and qjs. prefix
- In C: uses POP() macro and FROZEN_FREE
